requirement.description: The gateway shall transmit a wake-up indication to all connected networks upon ignition ON.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import time
import can
import pytest

GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_ID = 0x100
GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_DLC = 8

# ---------------------------
# CAN Bus Fixture
# ---------------------------
@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.Bus(
        interface="vector",      # vector / socketcan / pcan configurable
        channel=0,
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

# ---------------------------
# Utility Functions
# ---------------------------
def collect_messages(bus, msg_id, duration_sec):
    messages = []
    start_time = time.time()
    while time.time() - start_time < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.5)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == msg_id:
            messages.append(msg)
    return messages


def decode_alive_counter(msg):
    return msg.data[0]


def decode_gateway_status(msg):
    return msg.data[1]

test_cases.title: Verify GW_OperationalPresence transmission on ignition ON
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle ignition OFF; Gateway ECU powered OFF; CAN monitoring tool connected and configured to capture message ID 0x100
steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_OperationalPresence message
test_cases.expected_result: GW_OperationalPresence message is transmitted immediately after ignition ON, indicating network wake-up
test_cases.postcondition: Switch ignition OFF; disconnect CAN monitoring tool

test_cases.title: Verify GW_Status indicates gateway active
test_cases.expected_result: GW_Status = 1 indicating gateway and networks are awake

test_cases.title: Verify GW_AliveCounter increments after wake-up
Verify no wake-up indication when ignition OFF
steps: Monitor CAN bus with ignition OFF
test_cases.expected_result: No GW_OperationalPresence messages transmitted while ignition is OFF

test_cases.title: Verify immediate wake-up transmission on ignition ON
steps: Measure time to first GW_OperationalPresence message
test_cases.expected_result: GW_OperationalPresence transmitted in the first available CAN cycle after ignition ON

test_cases.title: Verify GW_OperationalPresence message DLC
Verify retransmission after ignition cycle
test_cases.expected_result: GW_OperationalPresence message is transmitted again after ignition cycle
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_wake_007_retransmission_after_ignition_cycle(can_bus):
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_ID, 3)
    assert msgs

test_cases.title: Verify wake-up indication stops when ignition OFF
test_cases.expected_result: GW_OperationalPresence message transmission stops after ignition OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_wake_008_stop_on_ignition_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_ID, 2)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_ID, 2)
    assert not msgs_after
